day5_lunch_start_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_start_3.text: *I stood up before Sea could say 'let's eat together.'*

day5_lunch_start_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_start_5.text: *I didn't look at Sea. I was afraid I'd stop if I did.*

day5_lunch_start_6.name: Me
day5_lunch_start_6.text: *Left the classroom. The corridor. Turn left. Toward the old building.*

day5_lunch_start_7.name: Me
day5_lunch_start_7.text: *I walk. I want to run but I have to walk. Running draws attention. I gripped the bag strap tight. My palms are sweating.*

day5_lunch_start_8.name: Me
day5_lunch_start_8.text: *The corridor is long. Endlessly long. I can see the connecting passage toward the old building. I looked back. Nobody there. ...Not yet.*

day5_lunch_branch.name: Me
day5_lunch_branch.text: *The place Yuna told me about. Old building, 3rd floor.*

day5_lunch_yuna_meet.name: Me
day5_lunch_yuna_meet.text: *I entered the old building. The lighting is dim. More than half the fluorescent lights are off. No sign of anyone.*

day5_lunch_yuna_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_yuna_2.text: *...Someone is standing beside the staircase. Small frame. Holding a camera.*

day5_lunch_yuna_7.name: Yuna
day5_lunch_yuna_7.text: "There's an emergency exit at the end of the 3rd floor of the old building. It's a route Seolhwa-sunbae... found one year ago. She told me in a dream."

day5_lunch_yuna_9.name: Yuna
day5_lunch_yuna_9.text: "But... we have to get through that corridor. Someone will be guarding it. ...Probably."

day5_lunch_yuna_11.name: Me
day5_lunch_yuna_11.text: *Yuna nods. She bites her lip hard. She's scared. But she moves.*

day5_lunch_yuna_12.name: Me
day5_lunch_yuna_12.text: *We started up the stairs. 1st floor. 2nd floor. 3rd floor.*

day5_lunch_solo.name: Me
day5_lunch_solo.text: *I entered the old building. Alone. The lighting is dim. I have to find the emergency exit.*

day5_lunch_solo_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_solo_2.text: *I go up the stairs. At the end of the 3rd floor corridor, I can see the green glow of the emergency exit sign. ...There.*

day5_lunch_escape_start.name: Me
day5_lunch_escape_start.text: *3rd floor corridor. Long and dark. At the far end, the green glow of the emergency exit sign is visible.*

day5_lunch_escape_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_escape_3.text: *Footsteps from behind. Click. Click. Shoe heels. Not just one pair. Several.*

day5_lunch_escape_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_escape_5.text: *I run. I started running down the corridor. Sneakers slap the tile. Tap-tap-tap-tap. My bag rattles against my back.*

day5_lunch_escape_6.name: Me
day5_lunch_escape_6.text: *A fork in the path. The corridor splits into a T-junction.*

day5_lunch_escape_left.name: Me
day5_lunch_escape_left.text: *I turned left. ...I stopped. Sea is standing there. In the middle of the corridor. Arms crossed. She was waiting for me.*

day5_lunch_left_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_left_2.text: *...She was in the classroom until just a moment ago. How did she get here?*

day5_lunch_sea_talk_1c.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_talk_1c.text: *Sea's voice is cold. This isn't the bright voice from Day 1.*

day5_lunch_sea_cb_choco.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_choco.text: "You smiled and said you liked chocolate milk that time. I went around the school store three times just to get some for you."

day5_lunch_sea_cb_lunch.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_lunch.text: "I woke up every morning at dawn to pack a lunch... I was smiling while I made the octopus sausages..."

day5_lunch_sea_cb_vulnerability.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_vulnerability.text: "In the student council room at sunset... you nodded when I said I wanted you to stay by my side."

day5_lunch_sea_cb_default.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_default.text: "...We were in the same class. Only five days, but..."

day5_lunch_sea_tears.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_tears.text: *Tears fall from Sea's eyes. Real tears. This isn't an act.*

day5_lunch_sea_tears_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_tears_2.text: *...My chest aches. I know Sea is a victim too. Another bird trapped in this school.*

day5_lunch_sea_pass.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_pass.text: *Sea is standing in the corridor. ...But she doesn't block the way. She's staring at me blankly. I passed by her.*

day5_lunch_sea_block_high_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_block_high_2.text: *Sea grabbed my arm. There's force in her grip.*

day5_lunch_sea_block_max.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_block_max.text: *'Click.' Sea locked the classroom door behind her. ...There's no way out of here.*

day5_lunch_sea_block_max_2.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_block_max_2.text: "Just look at me. You only need to look at me. ...You understand, right, {name}?"

day5_lunch_sea_push.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_push.text: *I brushed past Sea. Our shoulders collided.*

day5_lunch_sea_push_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_push_2.text: *From behind, I hear Sea crying. I didn't look back. If I look back, I'll stop.*

day5_lunch_sea_persuade_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_persuade_3.text: "You're trapped here too. By Ms. Eunsu. By this school."

day5_lunch_sea_persuade_4.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_persuade_4.text: "...There's nothing for me outside. This is all I know."

day5_lunch_sea_persuade_9.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_persuade_9.text: *"...Don't look back." Sea's final words echo down the corridor. I started running. I didn't look back.*

day5_lunch_escape_right.name: Me
day5_lunch_escape_right.text: *I turned right. The smell of disinfectant. Strong. ...The same smell from the nurse's office.*

day5_lunch_right_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_right_2.text: *In the middle of the corridor, Nurse Riin is standing. White coat. One hand in her pocket.*

day5_lunch_riin_talk_1b.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_talk_1b.text: *The teacher takes her hand out of her pocket. She's holding a syringe.*

day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink.name: Riin
day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink.text: "You said the tea tasted good that time. I personally selected the herbs and blended it."

day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink_3.text: *Nurse Riin's hand is trembling. The hand holding the syringe.*

day5_lunch_riin_cb_met.name: Riin
day5_lunch_riin_cb_met.text: "When you came to the nurse's office on your very first day, I was genuinely happy."

day5_lunch_riin_cb_met_2.name: Riin
day5_lunch_riin_cb_met_2.text: "...Did you know? You were the first student like you I'd ever had."

day5_lunch_riin_cb_default.name: Riin
day5_lunch_riin_cb_default.text: "Last checkup. Just one blood draw and it's over. Relax~"

day5_lunch_riin_cb_default_2.name: Riin
day5_lunch_riin_cb_default_2.text: "...No student who got an injection from me ever said it hurt."

day5_lunch_riin_block.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_block.text: *Nurse Riin smiles. The same gentle smile as always. But her eyes are sharp.*

day5_lunch_riin_dodge.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_dodge.text: *I ran past Nurse Riin. The syringe grazed my arm. The needle tore my uniform sleeve.*

day5_lunch_riin_dodge_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_dodge_3.text: *From behind, I heard the sound of glass breaking. She must have dropped the syringe.*

day5_lunch_riin_confront.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_confront.text: "You know too, Nurse Riin. That this is wrong."

day5_lunch_riin_confront_3.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_confront_3.text: *The teacher lets out a breath. A long, deep exhale. As if something is draining from her body.*

day5_lunch_riin_confront_4.name: Riin
day5_lunch_riin_confront_4.text: "...I refused at first too. When the board of directors ordered me."

day5_lunch_riin_confront_5.name: Riin
day5_lunch_riin_confront_5.text: "But once you start... you can't stop."

day5_lunch_riin_confront_7.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_confront_7.text: *Nurse Riin sets the syringe down on the floor. The glass makes a tap sound against the tile. She leans back against the wall and sits down. Eyes closed. I ran. Past Nurse Riin. Toward the emergency exit.*

day5_lunch_escape_caught_sea.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_escape_caught_sea.text: "Gotcha. ...You're not going anywhere now, are you?"

day5_lunch_continue.name: Me
day5_lunch_continue.text: *Going up the stairs. Out of breath. Legs are heavy. But I can't stop.*

day5_lunch_continue_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_continue_2.text: *End of the 3rd floor corridor. I can see the emergency exit. The green 'EXIT' sign. Glowing.*

day5_lunch_continue_4.name: Me
day5_lunch_continue_4.text: *Ms. Eunsu is standing in front of the emergency exit. Arms crossed. She was waiting. As if she had been here from the very start.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_face_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_face_2.text: *The teacher looks at me. Sad eyes.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app.text: "You thanked me when I set up the app, remember?"

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app_2.text: "...I thought what a good student you were then. I meant it."

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit.text: "You came to say hello yourself after school on your first day."

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit_2.text: "From that moment... your teacher felt you were special. You were different from other transfer students."

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_default.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_default.text: "Your teacher did all of this for you."

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea.text: *Wrinkles form around Ms. Eunsu's eyes. A tired face. She looks like she hasn't slept.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_3.text: "Outside... nobody will think about you this much."

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_4.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_4.text: "You're safe here. Your teacher will protect you from everything."

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_5.text: *The teacher's voice trembles. ...She's sincere. This person, twisted as she is, genuinely believes she's 'protecting.' ...But does she not know that her 'protection' is a prison? Or does she know and still can't stop?*

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high.text: "{name}. Do you know how worried I was? ...Let's stop this and come back now."

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high_2.text: "You're not going to listen to your teacher? ...{name} is a good kid, aren't you."

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max.text: *There's a padlock on the emergency exit. ...It won't open.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max_2.text: "Where do you think you're going? ...I've prepared everything. {name}, you just need to stay here."

day5_lunch_eunsu_yuna_help.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_yuna_help.text: *Suddenly, the fire alarm goes off at the end of the corridor. ...It's Yuna! The moment Ms. Eunsu's attention turned away, I ran.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_break.text: *I passed Ms. Eunsu. Our shoulders collided. The teacher stretched out her hand to grab me. Her fingers grazed my uniform sleeve. ...She missed.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_break_2.text: *I pushed the emergency exit. A heavy door. I put my whole body into it.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break_4.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_break_4.text: *Cold air slaps my face. It's raining. Raindrops hit my face.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break_5.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_break_5.text: *Beyond the emergency exit, there's light. A cloudy sky, but... the light of the outside world.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay.text: *...The strength went out of my legs. I sank down. I can't run anymore. My body won't listen.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_3.text: "This is right. Your teacher will protect you from everything."

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_4.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_4.text: *Ms. Eunsu took my hand. A warm hand. A large hand. A hand that gently envelops. ...There's no going back. The moment I took this hand.*

day5_lunch_breakthrough.name: Me
day5_lunch_breakthrough.text: *I didn't look back. Going down the stairs. In the rain.*
